testcase.name: test_login_with_valid_driver[chromium]

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/dashboard')' Actual value: http://127.0.0.1:48215/auth/login Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 14 × unexpected value "http://127.0.0.1:48215/auth/login"

testcase.failure: tests/e2e/test_auth.py:33: in test_login_with_valid_driver expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile("/dashboard")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/dashboard')' E Actual value: http://127.0.0.1:48215/auth/login E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 14 × unexpected value "http://127.0.0.1:48215/auth/login"

testcase.name: test_dashboard_loads[chromium]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "re.compile('/dashboard')" until 'load' ============================================================

testcase.failure: tests/e2e/test_navigation.py:52: in test_dashboard_loads _login(page, base_url, **driver_creds) tests/e2e/test_navigation.py:16: in _login page.wait_for_url(re.compile("/dashboard")) /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:9766: in wait_for_url self._sync( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_page.py:585: in wait_for_url return await self._main_frame.wait_for_url(**locals_to_params(locals())) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:266: in wait_for_url async with self.expect_navigation( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_event_context_manager.py:33: in __aexit__ await self._future /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:242: in continuation event = await waiter.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E =========================== logs =========================== E waiting for navigation to "re.compile('/dashboard')" until 'load' E ============================================================
